creator: kseniia.journey-london-rexby
caption:
A special “Marmalade May” celebration at The Paddington Store 🧸🍊

A free public event inspired by Paddington to celebrate the launch of the Paddington: The Musical-Original Cast Recording 🎶✨

Featuring Paddington costume character appearances🐻, face painting 🎨, marmalade tasting experiences 🍊, sweet treats from Brigit’s Bakery🍰 & more 📸

📆 Sunday 24th of May until 4pm
📍 The Paddington Store, Paddington Station @paddingtonbear @studiocanaluk @rainbowdesignsltd 

📸 @kseniia.journey
